song.title: Give Me A Sight O Savior
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Give me a sight, O Savior, Of Thy wondrous love to me, Of the love that brought Thee down to earth, To die on Calvary.
[C] Chorus Oh, make me understand it, Help me to take it in, What it meant to Thee, the Holy One, To bear away my sin.
[V2] 2) Was it the nails, O Savior, That bound Thee to the tree? Nay, it was Thine everlasting love, Thy love for me, for me.
[V3] 3) Oh, wonder of all wonders, That through Thy death for me, My open sins, my secret sins, Can all forgiven be.
[V4] 4) Then melt my heart, O Savior, Bend me, yea, break me down, Until I own Thee Conqueror, And Lord and Sov’reign crown.
song.author: Katherine A.M. Kelly
